shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers between 1am and 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 50. Southwest wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.
